rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Growth needs your cooperation,
not your corpses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you want cooperation, first you should
put away those dangerous weapons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0005
rows.name: Don't make me laugh, you runts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Turns out what's needed isn't
cooperation, it's submission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0009
rows.name:
It worked before.\You'll get
used to it soon enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Captain, these guys are
noisy. Let's just shoot 'em.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0011
rows.name: Right. Kill one, maybe the rest will obey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0014
rows.name:
Looks like we made it. Quickly
now, while we have the chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0017
rows.name:
We saw the anti-air weapons down too,
yo! It's all thanks to you guys, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05120100_MSG0019
rows.name: Let's deal with these guys first![ST:wait ]
